endpoints.label: Create Blob

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Container to create or replace a blob in (provide the ID)

fields.label: Blob Name
fields.description: The name of the new or existing blob

fields.label: Binary Contents
fields.description: The name of the input binary field containing the file to be written

fields.label: URL
fields.description: URL where to read of the blob contents from

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: accessTier, blobType, cacheControl, contentCrc64, contentEncoding, contentLanguage, contentMd5, contentType, encryptionContext, encryptionScope, expiryOption, expiryTime, filename, immutabilityPolicyUntilDate, immutabilityPolicyMode, leaseId, legalHold, metadata, origin, tags)

endpoints.description: Create a new blob or replace an existing one

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Container to delete a blob from (provide the ID)

fields.label: Blob
fields.description: Blob to be deleted (provide the ID)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: leaseId)

endpoints.label: Get Blob

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Container to get a blob from (provide the ID)

fields.label: Blob
fields.description: Blob to get (provide the ID)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: leaseId, origin, simplify, upn)

endpoints.description: Retrieve data for a specific blob

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Container to get blobs from (provide the ID)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields, filter, simplify, upn)

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container Name
fields.description: The name of the new container

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: accessLevel, metadata)

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Select the container to delete (provide the ID)

endpoints.label: Get Container

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Container
fields.description: Select the container to get (provide the ID)

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: simplify)

endpoints.description: Retrieve data for a specific container

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Azure Storage server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields, filter)
